name: Mutual Non-Disclosure Agreement
description: Standard terms for a mutual non-disclosure agreement allowing both parties to share confidential information for a defined purpose.

name: Mutual NDA Cover Page
description: Cover page template for the Common Paper Mutual NDA, including fields for purpose, effective date, term, governing law, and party signatures.

name: Cloud Service Agreement
description: Common Paper standard Cloud Service Agreement covering SaaS product access, restrictions, privacy, payment, term, warranties, liability, indemnification, and confidentiality.

name: Design Partner Agreement
description: Common Paper standard Design Partner Agreement for early-access product partnerships, covering product access, feedback, IP ownership, confidentiality, and general terms.

name: Service Level Agreement
description: Common Paper Service Level Agreement defining uptime and response time targets, service credits, and remedies for cloud service providers.

name: Professional Services Agreement
description: Common Paper standard Professional Services Agreement covering statements of work, deliverables, IP assignment, payment, warranties, liability, indemnification, and confidentiality.

name: Data Processing Agreement
description: Common Paper Data Processing Agreement covering GDPR-compliant processor obligations, restricted transfers, EEA/UK SCCs, security incident response, and audit rights.

name: Partnership Agreement
description: Common Paper standard Partnership Agreement covering mutual obligations, trademark licensing, payment, confidentiality, liability, and indemnification for business partnerships.

name: Software License Agreement
description: Common Paper standard Software License Agreement covering on-premise software licensing, restrictions, payment, warranties, liability, indemnification, and confidentiality.

name: Pilot Agreement
description: Common Paper standard Pilot Agreement for short-term product evaluations, covering access, restrictions, disclaimer of warranties, liability cap, and confidentiality.

name: Business Associate Agreement
description: Common Paper standard Business Associate Agreement (HIPAA BAA) covering PHI handling obligations, safeguards, breach notification, and subcontractor requirements.

name: AI Addendum
description: Common Paper Standard AI Addendum covering AI service usage, model training restrictions, IP ownership of inputs and outputs, and AI-specific disclaimers.
